---
title: optimize-operands-order
description: "Put cheap logical operands first."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Put cheap logical operands first. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if expensiveCheck() && ready { start() }
```

## Good

```go
if ready && expensiveCheck() { start() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only optimize-operands-order`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
